title: CCL - Put the app in the background
scenario: CCL setting persists correctly after app is backgrounded and foregrounded on Device Settings > Advanced
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure a device that supports CCL (Call/Chat Control Language) is connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Advanced.
3. Select any CCL value from the available options.
4. Press the Home button or recent apps button to put the app in the background.
5. After a few seconds, bring the app back to the foreground by tapping the app icon or selecting it from the recent apps list.
6. Navigate back to Device Settings → Advanced.
expected: The app displays the previously selected CCL setting that was chosen in step 3.
